introSection: Waku Waku Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tojoko Toy Kingdom in Tojo, Hyogo, Japan. The roller coaster is by Hoei Sangyo Co., Ltd. with Saeki as a subcontractor.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has blue track and yellow supports.

fullText:
Waku Waku Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tojoko Toy Kingdom in Tojo, Hyogo, Japan. The roller coaster is by Hoei Sangyo Co., Ltd. with Saeki as a subcontractor.

The ride has blue track and yellow supports.
